narrative:
Precinct Goshen 1/Roswell (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 732 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
